name: Cambodia
avoid: Beware of landmines in rural areas away from tourist zones

cities.name: Siem Reap
cities.notes: Gateway to Angkor Wat, Ta Prohm jungle temple and Pub Street

cities.name: Phnom Penh
cities.notes: Royal Palace, Tuol Sleng Genocide Museum and Mekong riverside

cities.name: Sihanoukville
cities.notes: Beach resort base for Koh Rong and Koh Rong Sanloem islands

cities.name: Kampot
cities.notes: Charming riverside town famous for Kampot pepper and Bokor Hill Station
